title: Fireproof Netherite
description: Get Fire Resistance for 16 seconds when wearing full Netherite Armor!
body:
# Fireproof Netherite Datapack for Minecraft Java Edition 
Make sure to install the Datapack Version that correctly matches your Minecraft Version or issues may arise.

## 📖 About

Full Netherite Armor will grant a brief stint of Fire Resistance.

## 📝 Features

With this Datapack you receive Fire Resistace when wearing Netherite Armor. You must be wearing full Netherite or the effect will not take place. 

## ❗Important Information

The Fire Resistance lasts for **16 Seconds** after initially getting caught on fire. If you are still on fire after the initial 16 Seconds, there is a cooldown of **15 Seconds** before you get your Fire Resistance back, but only if you are no longer on fire.

## 📂 Installation
Be sure to install this Datapack to the right location or it will not work properly. 

The *correct* file path is **saves/[world]/datapacks** 

## ℹ️ Extra Information
I now have a Ko-fi link located on the pack’s Modrinth page on the sidebar, but always remember donations are appreciated, but **never** required.

## 👾 Bugs/Issues
Please report any issues to the Discord located in the Links tab, or on the Planet Minecraft page.
